audit_items.proof_trace: getChunks contains zero raw allocations (no new/malloc/SASS_MEMORY_NEW); all locals are std::vector<T> with RAII semantics, and T=std::vector<SelectorComponentObj> where SelectorComponentObj is SharedImpl<SelectorComponent> (reference-counted). On every return path and on exception via stack unwinding, all vector buffers and SharedImpl refcounts are automatically released. No detach() call exists in this function to suppress deallocation.
